waaagh-power.name: 'Ead Banger
waaagh-power.description: Target model takes a Toughness test on 2d6. If it fails, it suffers 1 Mortal Wound.

waaagh-power.name: Da Jump
waaagh-power.description: Friendly target unit is removed from the table and immediately Deepstrikes. This special Deepstrike does not grant the usual 4+ Cover Save. If targeting a Vehicle the Cast is 8+ instead.

waaagh-power.name: Waaagh! Energy
waaagh-power.description: Target unit gains Furious Charge until your next Psychic Phase.

waaagh-power.name: Da Krunch
waaagh-power.description: Assault 1, 5" Blast. Krunch — Any roll of double 1s or 6s for Scatter centers the blast on the Caster instead without Scattering. Any roll of a Double for Strength changes Da Krunch to Assault 2 for this casting.

waaagh-power.name: Warpath
waaagh-power.description: Target unit gains A+1 until your next Psychic Phase.
